_comment: SaaS Promo Template — narrative skeleton. Product-agnostic. The build script maps each scene to a cut in the existing Remotion 'Explainer' composition. Do not put product wording here; that lives in projects/<name>/config.json.

scenes.title: Problem
scenes.role: Name the pain the product removes.

scenes.title: Solution
scenes.role: Introduce the product as the answer.

scenes.title: Workflow
scenes.role: Show how it works in a sentence.

scenes.title: CTA
scenes.role: Brand close + call to action. A bottom-left overlay shows the badge and website.
